title: Lamudi Indonesia Property Scraper
description: Collect property listings from Lamudi Indonesia using API endpoints.

url.title: Property URL
url.description: Lamudi Indonesia listing URL, such as https://www.lamudi.co.id/en/for-sale/ or a filtered location URL.

results_wanted.title: Results wanted
results_wanted.description: Maximum number of properties to collect.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Use Apify Proxy for higher reliability.
